title: Mobile Developer(iOS) - 12 Months Contract - Up to SGD8.4k
description:
We’re hiring an iOS Engineer on behalf of our client, a leading technology company operating across Southeast Asia. You’ll design and build scalable applications using SwiftUI and Objective‑C, collaborate with cross‑functional teams, and take ownership of projects that drive innovation and performance. This role offers the opportunity to mentor peers, contribute to high‑impact initiatives, and be part of a fast‑growing regional tech leader.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain iOS applications using SwiftUI and Objective‑C.  
  • Work closely with mobile, backend, design, data science, and product teams to architect and deliver new features.
  • Contribute to code and design reviews to uphold high engineering standards.
  • Generate innovative ideas, identify challenges, and implement scalable, high‑performance solutions.
  • Take full ownership of projects, ensuring they meet both functional and non‑functional requirements for users and business partners.
  • Build, optimize, and deploy reusable iOS components to support operational excellence.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders across multiple teams to resolve complex business, legal, and product needs.
  • Participate in interview processes to help recruit top talent.
  • Provide mentorship, technical guidance, and knowledge sharing to peers.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in IT or a related field.  
  • At least 4+ years of professional software development experience, including at least 2 years focused on iOS.
  • Strong proficiency in SwiftUI and Objective‑C.
  • Hands‑on experience with Large Language Models (LLMs) and Machine Learning.  
  • Background in Android development alongside iOS expertise.   
  • Proven track record of owning end‑to‑end feature delivery.
  • Experience managing large‑scale applications with knowledge of systems internals, crash analytics, remote debugging, and CI tools.
  • Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines and implementation.

Interested candidates may apply through the application system or send it to sg-rscontracting@morganmckinley.com . Shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to Morgan Mckinley Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.morganmckinley.com/sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd
Koh Boon Sien
EA Licence No: 11C5502
EA Registration No. R1110345

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
postedCompany.name: MORGAN MCKINLEY PTE. LTD.
